title: I Got a Job
overview: Kondou, an exhausted corporate slave, is accidentally summoned to another world and decides to find a job.

title: I Got a Promotion
overview: Commander Indolark gets involved with Seiichiro after saving him from overdose poisoning and magic-sickness.

title: I Got a Manager
overview: Commander Aresh just can't leave Kondou alone. Is it just a sense of responsibility, or something more?

title: I Punished Them
overview: Kondou gets assaulted by three knights. It's the perfect chance to punish them and get some compensation.

title: I Went on an Expedition
overview: Kondou gets dragged along to the purification.

title: I Made a Proposal
overview: Kondou goes on the expedition and prepares a proposal that may change the value of the holy maiden forever.

title: I Went on a Temporary Assignment
overview: Kondou gets assigned to the Romany Royal Capital Branch of the Church of Abran to inspect their books.

title: I Went to Work on My Day Off
overview: Kondou continues his investigation at the church, but still heads to the royal palace on his day off...

title: I Made a Plan
overview: Yua is bothered by the kingdom's educational system and Kondou decides he needs to make a plan for change.

title: I Investigated
overview: Kondou finds out there's more to the sacred relics than he thought, but something still doesn't add up.

title: I Got Hospitalized
overview: Kondou is hospitalized due to a child's magical energy going berserk, but was it an accident?

title: We Cornered Him. And Then…
overview: Seiichirou Kondou is transported to a new world and joins the Royal Accounting Department of Romany Kingdom.
